specFidelityNotes: Re-review after draft→approvedInputs fix. Editable review drafts now merge into ExecutionRecord.approvedInputs via demo-state startExecution → lib/executions.startExecution(workflowKey, approvedInputs). Approved workflows are removed from Recommendations until Manual Refresh. Five-stage review route, analytics deep-link, workflow/tool recording, In Progress shells, 14-step timeline, mock-only path all match issue #400 + scope-alignment intent.
